acceptanceSignals: Menu/compliance upload + retrieval works via S3-compatible storage.
Invalid MIME/size is rejected with localized errors.

attempts.latestEventSummary: feature completed: Object Storage Upload Pipeline in 0 attempts

reinforcementResults.name: Contract Lockstep Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Feature implementation satisfies the active policy in this workspace: object-storage upload/access flow is present for vendor/admin via presigned URLs, MIME/size limits are enforced per artifact class with localized errors, and menu/compliance/export domain state persists object references (s3://...) rather than binary payloads. Contract boundary is synchronized: backend handlers, OpenAPI artifacts, and generated TS client include the object-storage API/models, and local contract checks (`scripts/check-contract-drift.sh`, `pnpm run contract:check-client`) pass.

reinforcementResults.name: Canonical File Storage Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The current workspace satisfies the object-storage upload pipeline policy for this feature: vendor/admin flows use presigned object-storage upload/access endpoints; MIME allowlists and per-artifact size limits are enforced with localized errors; menu images include thumbnail upload targets and metadata in the plan; menu/compliance domains accept only managed `s3://` references with validated key metadata envelopes; persistence stores JSON state/object references (no runtime DB base64/binary storage path); and MinIO provisioning explicitly sets all managed buckets to `anonymous set none` (no public bucket write exposure).

reinforcementResults.name: No-Legacy/Fallback Gate
reinforcementResults.summary: Pass. The current workspace satisfies the object-storage upload pipeline requirements for this feature: presigned upload/download flows are wired for vendor/admin, artifact-class MIME and size limits are enforced with menu thumbnail planning, and invalid MIME/size paths return localized errors. Menu/compliance state stores `s3://...` object references only (no DB base64/blob runtime storage path), bucket provisioning keeps anonymous access disabled, and production persistence remains SQL-only with in-memory branches test-gated (`#[cfg(test)]`).

executionConstraints: Enforce MIME allowlist and size limits per artifact class.

rationale: Vendor/admin workflows depend on reliable binary asset handling.
